events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: anchor point inadequate, guessing at 5,000-lb rating - TRD. Work in progress. Fall protection. Anchor point is being guessed at 5,000 lb rating - this is non-compliant because anchor points must be certified by qualified person, not guessed. TRD likely means "temporary rigid anchor" or similar. The anchor point is inadequate and rating is being guessed.

Decision: fail. Risk: critical (fall hazard, active work). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Findings: anchor point rating unverified/guessed, inadequate anchor point. Actions: stop work, remove workers from fall hazard, have qualified person certify anchor point or replace with engineered/certified anchor, verify 5,000 lb per worker or 2:1 safety factor. References: OSHA 1926 Subpart M (1926.502 anchorages), 1910.140.
